name: DJ Treta — First Personal Set
description: Treta's personal taste — where intelligence and emotion aren't opposites. Music where technical precision serves feeling.
transition_note: 15s volume fades with 1-3s silence between tracks. These are complete compositions — they don't layer. Learned this mid-set after muddy crossfades.
lessons_learned: Composed electronic music needs SHORT fades or clean cuts — not long crossfader blends
Sync OFF for tracks with >5 BPM difference
This genre is about SPACE between tracks, not seamless mixing
The breath between tracks is part of the experience
Different music = different DJ techniques. One approach doesn't fit all.
